name: Advance America
description_short: Detroit, MI: Advance America at 14640 Mack Ave provides payday loans, title loans, and check cashing, Mon–Sat.
description_long:
Advance America is located at 14640 Mack Ave in Detroit, MI, operating as a standalone storefront. The Detroit location maintains consistent hours: Monday through Thursday 10AM–6PM, Friday 9AM–6PM, and Saturday 10AM–2PM. The branch closes on Sundays.

This Detroit location specializes in short-term lending solutions, including payday loans and title loans. The branch also provides check cashing services for customers in need of quick access to funds. For rates, terms, or to discuss your options, call 313-821-5128 to reach a loan officer.

Detroit residents facing unexpected expenses or cash gaps before payday can apply quickly at this location. Bring a valid photo ID, recent proof of income (pay stub or bank statement), and information about an active checking account. The branch serves customers regardless of credit history.
pros: Same-day funding available on payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Three distinct loan products (payday, installment, title) to match different needs and amounts
Title loans up to $25,000 via LoanCenter partnership for vehicle owners
Online application available — no store visit required for most products
Phone pre-qualification lets borrowers check eligibility before applying
Western Union money transfers available in-store
cons: Payday loans capped at $500 and carry the high APRs typical of the industry
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle with clear title in the borrower's name
Store is closed Sundays, limiting access for some emergency situations
Not a fit for borrowers needing amounts above $1,000 without a vehicle to pledge as collateral
Short-term, high-cost products — cheaper alternatives (credit union PALs, employer advances) should be exhausted first
best_for: Workers facing a short-term cash gap before their next paycheck with no credit card available
Borrowers with poor or thin credit who cannot qualify for a traditional personal loan
Vehicle owners who need $2,000–$25,000 quickly and have a paid-off car or truck
Spanish-speaking customers who prefer bilingual in-person service in west Jacksonville
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers who need $100–$1,000 in emergency cash immediately and cannot access lower-cost alternatives like a credit union or employer advance. Borrowers with a paid-off vehicle can access significantly larger amounts via the title loan product, but risk repossession if they default. The high cost of payday and short-term installment products makes Advance America a stopgap, not a long-term financial solution.
services: Title Loans ($2,000–$25,000, via LoanCenter, vehicle as collateral)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
